title: RBI Responsible Business Conduct (Second Amendment) Directions, 2026
description: <cite index="44-12,44-13,44-14">RBI tightened rules governing the sale of financial products by banks and other regulated entities. The final Responsible Business Conduct (Second Amendment) Directions, 2026 were released on 15 June 2026 and will come into effect from 1 January 2027. The amendments ban compulsory bundling of third-party products, mandate explicit customer consent, introduce a full refund mechanism for mis-selling, ban dark patterns in digital interfaces.</cite>
